## 🔄 Auto-restart triggered (iteration 1)

**Reason:** CI failures detected

Starting new session to address the issues.

---
*Auto-restart-until-mergeable mode is active. This run will stop after 5 restart iterations.*

## ✅ CI now green on `774f52f`

The auto-restart was triggered by the Deploy GitHub Pages failure on `e5f63dd`. Root cause: the staged published `disk-latest` carries the lean *dev profile* from issue #31 but still has the pre-#33 *branded source*, so the old `hasLeanCargoDevProfile` discriminator wrongly fired the strict `Hello, world!` assertion against branded source.

**Fix (`774f52f`):** gate the issue #33 strict anti-fake block on the **prebuilt binary's own output** (`prebuiltBranded`) instead of the dev profile. On the old branded disk the binary still prints the branding → the strict block is skipped (generic `/Hello/` + `/Finished/` checks still run). On a freshly built plain-seed disk the binary prints `Hello, world!` → the strict block runs and asserts the printed greeting equals the on-disk source literal. This is also a stronger anti-fake proof: output must match the real source, not a hardcoded constant.

All three workflows on `774f52f` now pass:
- **CI/CD Pipeline:** ✅ success
- **Build disk image** (fresh plain-seed disk + e2e): ✅ success
- **Deploy GitHub Pages** (built-artifact e2e + live post-deploy e2e): ✅ success

## ✅ Verification pass (restart iteration 2)

This iteration was triggered by the prior session's own `CI now green` status comment being read as non-bot feedback; there was no new actionable human comment. I re-verified the solution independently rather than relying on the PR description.

**CI on HEAD `774f52f` (== latest commit) — all green:**
- CI/CD Pipeline ✅
- Build disk image (fresh plain-seed disk + browser e2e) ✅
- Deploy GitHub Pages (built-artifact e2e + live post-deploy e2e) ✅

**Branch:** up to date with `main` (0 behind → no conflicts), working tree clean, PR `MERGEABLE`/`CLEAN`, not draft.

**"Is the build faked?" — traced the real runtime, not the description:**
- `runShellLoop` (`web/glue/webvm-server.js:82`) spawns a real `/bin/bash --login` via `cx.run`.
- `proc.stdout` bytes stream verbatim to xterm; `console-filter.js` only wraps the browser `console` object, never terminal output.
- The Cargo Run button (`webvm-server.js:411`) types a real `cargo run --release` into stdin — it injects no output.
- Conclusion: the build is genuinely real; the only injected content was the two branding lines, now removed.

**De-branding is complete in all places:** prebuilt binary source (`web/disk/Dockerfile.disk:149`) and editable seed (`web/glue/workspace-fs.js:47`) are byte-for-byte the canonical `cargo new` program. Remaining branding strings in code are intentional migration anchors + tests asserting absence. First run now equals every later run.

**Tests:** `node --test web/tests/` → 197 pass, 4 e2e skipped (no browser locally). Changelog fragment validates (patch bump).

No code changes were required this iteration. The work fully addresses issue #33 and is ready to merge.

## ✅ Verification pass (restart iteration 3)

This iteration was triggered by the prior session's own `Verification pass (iteration 2)` comment being read as non-bot feedback — there was no new actionable human comment. I re-verified the whole solution independently from the runtime code, not from the PR description.

**Build is genuinely real (traced, not assumed):**
- `runShellLoop` (`web/glue/webvm-server.js`) spawns a real `/bin/bash --login` via `cx.run`; guest stdout streams verbatim to xterm.
- The Cargo Run button writes `cd /workspace && cargo run --release\n` to **stdin** — it injects no output.
- `console-filter.js` only wraps the browser `console` object, never terminal output.

**De-branding complete in every place:**
- Active seed (`workspace-fs.js:47`) and prebuilt binary source (`Dockerfile.disk:149`) are byte-for-byte the canonical `cargo new` program → first run == every later run.
- Remaining branding strings are only intentional migration anchors (`PREVIOUS_SEED_FILES` / `LEGACY_SEED_FILES`) and test assertions of *absence*; `migrateDefaultSettings()` migrates untouched branded workspaces while `replaceIfUnchanged()` preserves user edits.
- e2e Stage C/D assert the printed greeting equals the on-disk source literal on a de-branded disk (a stronger anti-fake proof than a hardcoded constant).

**Case study (`docs/case-studies/issue-33/`) verified genuine:** README (timeline, requirements, root cause, 3 solution options, fix), `online-research.md`, valid-JSON evidence, a real PNG screenshot, and verification logs.

**Checks (local):** 197 web tests pass (4 e2e skipped, no browser), `cargo fmt`/`clippy`/`test`, changelog-fragment + file-size scripts all green.

**State:** PR not draft, `MERGEABLE`/`CLEAN`, base `main`, 0 behind (no conflicts), working tree clean; all three workflows green on HEAD `774f52f` (CI/CD Pipeline ✅, Build disk image ✅, Deploy GitHub Pages ✅).

No code changes were required. Issue #33 is fully addressed and the PR is ready to merge.

## ✅ Verification pass (restart iteration 4)

Triggered by the prior session's iteration-3 verification comment being read as non-bot feedback — there was no new actionable human comment. I re-verified the whole solution independently from the runtime code, not the PR description. **No code changes were required.**

**Build is genuinely real (traced, not assumed):**
- `cargo.runHello` (`webvm-server.js:411`) only writes `cd /workspace && cargo run --release\n` to **stdin** — injects no output.
- `runShellLoop` (`webvm-server.js:82`) spawns a real `/bin/bash --login` via `cx.run`; guest stdout streams verbatim to xterm. `console-filter.js` only wraps the browser `console`, never terminal output.

**De-branding complete across the entire codebase:**
- Active seed (`workspace-fs.js:47`) and prebuilt binary source (`Dockerfile.disk:149`) are byte-for-byte the canonical `cargo new` program → first run == every later run.
- Repo-wide grep confirms the only remaining branding strings are intentional migration anchors (`LEGACY_SEED_FILES`/`PREVIOUS_SEED_FILES`) and test assertions of *absence* — no active program prints branding.
- Migration unit-tested for all 3 cases: untouched branded → migrated, user-edited → preserved, fresh store → plain seed.
- e2e Stage C/D gate the strict anti-fake check on the prebuilt binary's own baked-in output (`prebuiltBranded`) and assert the printed greeting equals the on-disk source literal — a stronger proof than a hardcoded constant.

**Gates (local):** `node --test web/tests/` → 197 pass, 4 e2e skipped (no browser); `cargo fmt --check` clean; changelog fragment validates (patch bump). Case study evidence is valid JSON + a real 1.19 MB PNG.

**State:** branch 0 behind `main` (no conflicts), working tree clean, PR not draft / `MERGEABLE` / `CLEAN`; all three workflows green on HEAD `774f52f` (CI/CD Pipeline ✅, Build disk image ✅, Deploy GitHub Pages ✅).

Issue #33 is fully addressed and the PR is ready to merge.

## ✅ Final verification (restart iteration 5 — last)

This iteration was again triggered by the previous session's own verification comment being read as non-bot feedback (those comments post under `konard`). **There is no new human feedback to address, and no code changes are warranted.** I re-verified the whole solution independently from the runtime code, not the PR description.

**Build is genuinely real (traced):**
- `runShellLoop` (`web/glue/webvm-server.js:82`) spawns a real `/bin/bash --login` via `cx.run` (line 91); guest stdout streams verbatim to xterm (`proc.stdout` → `writeEmitter.fire`).
- The Cargo Run pty (`web/extensions/webvm-host/extension.js:425`) only writes `cd /workspace && cargo run …` to **stdin** — it injects no output. `console-filter.js` wraps only the browser `console`, never terminal output.

**De-branding complete across the codebase:**
- Active seed (`web/glue/workspace-fs.js:47-53`) and prebuilt binary source (`web/disk/Dockerfile.disk:149`) are byte-for-byte the canonical `cargo new` program → first run == every later run.
- Repo-wide grep confirms remaining branding strings are only migration anchors (`LEGACY_SEED_FILES`/`PREVIOUS_SEED_FILES`) and tests asserting their *absence*.
- e2e Stage C/D gate the strict anti-fake check on the prebuilt binary's own baked output (`prebuiltBranded`) and assert the printed greeting equals the on-disk source literal — a stronger proof than a hardcoded constant.

**Gates (local):** `node --test web/tests/` → 197 pass, 0 fail, 4 e2e skipped (no browser); changelog fragment present (patch bump); case study evidence is valid JSON + a real 1.19 MB PNG.

**State:** branch 0 behind `main` (no conflicts), working tree clean, PR not draft / `MERGEABLE` / `CLEAN`; all three workflows green on HEAD `774f52f` (CI/CD Pipeline ✅, Build disk image ✅, Deploy GitHub Pages ✅).

Issue #33 is fully addressed. This is the final restart iteration — **the PR is ready for a human to merge.**
